title: Eldoria Loriath
description:
Eldoria Lorianth is a modpack focused on exploration and RPG. Gather your best companions for this journey.

Minecraft Version - 1.20.1

Minimum Recommendation:
4 GB of RAM allocated
12 GB allocated if hosting
body:
# **Lore of Eldoria Lorianth**

## The Beginning of Time: The Creation of Eldoria Lorianth

*In the earliest days, before time was measured, Eldoria Lorianth was a void, formless consciousness. This primordial consciousness fractured and shaped itself into the Primordials, entities whose existence transcends comprehension. Together, the Primordials gave shape to the universe, creating the heavens, earth, and seas from their very being. To populate their creation, the Primordials fragmented once more, giving rise to the Ancient Gods, who in turn created the first races, each infused with its own divine essence.*

## The Age of the Gods and the First Civilization

*During the Age of the Gods, the races lived in harmony, guided by the wisdom and power of their creators. In this era, magnificent cities were built, and vast kingdoms formed, creating the First Civilization, where magic and technology coexisted in perfect symbiosis. However, as time passed, the Ancient Gods began to differ on how they should govern their creations. This conflict culminated in a devastating war known as the Celestial War.*

## The Fall and Fragmentation of Lorianth

*The Celestial War tore the fabric of reality, fragmenting Eldoria Lorianth into several separate dimensions. The once-powerful Ancient Gods were shattered, leading to the end of the great consciousness of Eldoria Lorianth, which became nothing more than all existence, unable to think on its own. The races, now isolated in their own dimensions, were forced to rebuild their civilizations without the direct guidance of the gods. This event marked the end of the First Civilization, whose relics and secrets were lost among the dimensions.*

## The Quest for Dominion

*As time passed, some of these civilizations began to look beyond their own dimensions, discovering that other races had also survived. Ambitions grew, and the desire for expansion and dominion over the other dimensions began to take shape, fueled by the quest to become as powerful as the Ancient Gods by seizing the relics of the First Civilization. Weapons were forged, secret wars waged, and the tenuous peace that existed began to unravel.*

## Summary of the Lore of Eldoria Lorianth

*Eldoria Lorianth began as a primordial consciousness that fragmented, giving rise to the Primordials, who shaped the universe and created the Ancient Gods. These gods formed the First Civilization, where magic and technology coexisted. However, disagreements among the Ancient Gods led to the Celestial War, which fragmented the universe into separate dimensions and caused the end of the great consciousness of Eldoria Lorianth.*

*In the New Age, the surviving races rebuilt their civilizations in the isolated dimensions, each developing its own cultures. Over time, some civilizations sought to expand their dominion, waging wars to acquire the relics of the First Civilization and become as powerful as the Ancient Gods.*

*Adventurers from the Overworld, a diverse and relatively peaceful dimension, are tasked with gathering these fragments and becoming the new lords of Eldoria Lorianth, shaping the destiny of all dimensions.*

## Main Objective for Players

*The adventurers on this journey are inhabitants of the Overworld, a relatively peaceful dimension but still full of conflicts, where various different races coexist. The duty of these adventurers is to gather all the fragments of the First Civilization, seeking to become the new lords of Eldoria Lorianth, restoring the lost power and shaping the destiny of all dimensions.*
